mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/Quick Quote

Turn Clear Requirements into a Quote Fast

For projects with clear drawings, material, quantity and lead time, quickly form quotation inputs and cost judgment.

Submit Quote Request

Let Clear Requirements Enter the Quote Scope Quickly

When drawings, material, quantity and lead time are clear, Quick Quote directly organizes the manufacturing scope and reduces repeated confirmation.

The system separates material, machining method, post-processing, inspection, packaging and delivery requirements so users understand what makes up the price.

Drawing ChecklistMaterial QuantityLead Time TargetPrice Feedback

Recommended Preparation

  • 2D drawings or 3D models
  • Target material and quantity
  • Post-processing and inspection requirements
  • Expected delivery time

What Quick Quote Outputs

Outputs focus on clear quotation scope, transparent assumptions, and the ability to continue into orders or engineering review.

Quotation ScopeClarify material, machining, finishing and logistics scope.
Lead Time JudgmentProvide a communicable delivery rhythm based on quantity and process complexity.
Manufacturing NotesMark dimensions, hole positions and tolerance requirements that may affect cost and lead time.

Where Quick Quote Fits

Suitable for projects with complete drawings, clear requirements and few changes. If information is missing or the process is uncertain, Instant Quoting or manual review is recommended.

01Complete InformationThe clearer the drawings, model, material grade, quantity, finish and inspection requirements, the faster the quotation response.
02Transparent ScopeClarify material, machining, post-processing, inspection, packaging and logistics scope to reduce later disputes.
03Exception TransferWhen special processes, urgent lead times or drawing inconsistencies appear, transfer to engineers for confirmation before returning a quote.

Submit Quick Quote Directly When Information Is Clear

Upload drawings and quantity information to form the quotation scope first, then confirm price, lead time and manufacturing range.

Submit Quote Request
